coverageGaps: No headed-browser, human-reviewable VIDEO was captured in either pass. Session 2 upgraded evidence from computed-style sampling to actual timed screenshots proving the entrance transition mid-flight, which is stronger than session 1's evidence but still not video.

Per-route category coverage (card stagger, filter/chevron/FAQ transitions, Process scroll progression, case-study expansion, contact form focus/validation states) verified only as 'renders correctly at rest', not as 'animation visibly plays' on 7 of 8 routes.
OS-level prefers-reduced-motion override test not executed — no tooling available to emulate it in this session.
Scroll-driven motion (section reveals, hover states, marquee pause/resume by pointer) not captured at all in this pass.
finalVerdictReason: The specific reported defect (hero entrance animation not visibly playing) is root-caused, fixed, deployed, and now confirmed with a real timed screenshot sequence showing the hero genuinely hidden-then-staggered-in on live production — stronger evidence than the original computed-interpolation-only pass. Reduced-motion mode and marquee motion are also confirmed working. However true headed-browser video evidence across all required categories (scroll motion, hover, FAQ, override test, full per-route animation playback) was not produced this pass, so the strict PASSED bar from the task's Section 14 is not met. PARTIAL stands, on stronger evidence than before.
